meta.title: The F-22's MONSTER $11 BILLION UPGRADE
meta.description:
The F-22 Raptor may be slated to retire by the mid-2030s, but the U.S. intends to make sure the Raptor maintains its air dominance edge right up until the last minute, and they're pumping $10.9 billion into the legendary fighter to make sure it does. 

Image credit to James Reeder on Instagram! 
https://www.instagram.com/boreeder/?hl=en

Read more about this slew of upgrades here: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/americas-f-22-will-see-serious-upgrades-before-retirement/

#shorts #short #f22 #f22raptor #stealth #stealthfighter #airpower
